title: Upon Her Alms.
content:
See how the poor do waiting stand
    For the expansion of thy hand.
    A wafer dol'd by thee will swell
    Thousands to feed by miracle.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Her Alms."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
